nodes.name: Every 6 Hours Check
nodes.notes: Har 6 ghante mein CRM check karta hai kis lead ko follow-up bhejna hai.

nodes.name: Find Leads Due for Follow-up
nodes.notes: Sheet mein ek column 'last_followup_stage' add karo taake dobara same din follow-up na jaye.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0.5, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "Write a short warm WhatsApp follow-up message (2-3 sentences) for a Dubai real estate lead. Stage determines tone: day1 = share property suggestions reminder, day3 = check interest, day7 = mention new listings might be available, day30 = re-engagement / reactivation. Do not invent specific property names." }, { "role": "user", "content": "=Stage: {{ $json.followup_stage }}. Customer wants {{ $json.property_type }} in {{ $json.area }}, budget AED {{ $json.budget_aed }}, intent {{ $json.intent }}" } ] } }}

nodes.name: Send Follow-up (Email/WhatsApp)
nodes.notes: MVP mein Gmail se test karo. Production mein isko WhatsApp Business API (HTTP Request node) se replace karna, jaisa Workflow 1 mein 8a node tha.

meta.description: Workflow 4: Automatic follow-up on Day 1/3/7/30 for leads that haven't closed. Runs on a schedule, checks CRM, sends AI-generated follow-up message, updates stage.
